name: Betty Crocker's Beef Stroganoff
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the beef across the grain into 3/4-inch slices, then into strips measuring 3 inches long by 1/4 inch wide.
2. Melt 1/4 cup butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
3. Cook and stir the mushrooms in the butter for about 5 minutes, then remove them from the skillet.
4. In the same skillet, brown the meat.
5. Reserve some of the broth and stir in the remaining broth, onion, catsup, and garlic salt. Cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
6. Blend the reserved broth with the flour; stir it into the meat mixture. Add the mushrooms and heat until boiling, stirring constantly.
7. Boil and stir for an additional minute. Stir in the sour cream and heat through until warmed evenly.
8. Cook the noodles according to the package instructions, then drain them well.
9. Toss the cooked noodles with 3 tablespoons butter before serving.
